name: test_should_construct_local_date_time[{year: 1984, month: 10, day: 11, hour: 12, minute: 31, second: 14, nanosecond: 789, millisecond: 123, microsecond: 456}-'1984-10-11T12:31:14.123456789']

statusDetails.message:
gdm_tck.exceptions.ResultComparisonError: Results do not match (any order comparison)
Expected: [{'result': '1984-10-11T12:31:14.123456789'}]
Actual:   [{'result': '1984-10-11T12:31:14.000000789'}]
statusDetails.trace:
E   gdm_tck.exceptions.ResultComparisonError: Results do not match (any order comparison)
    Expected: [{'result': '1984-10-11T12:31:14.123456789'}]
    Actual:   [{'result': '1984-10-11T12:31:14.000000789'}]

parameters.name: _pytest_bdd_example
parameters.value: {'map': '{year: 1984, month: 10, day: 11, hour: 12, minute: 31, second: 14, nanosecond: 789, millisecond: 123, microsecond: 456}', 'result': "'1984-10-11T12:31:14.123456789'"}
